article_meta.title: Trump’s Texas Deal Dilemma It’s Not Islamophobia, It’s Islamo-I’m-Sick-of-Hearing-About-It CNN Proves False Narratives A

reasoning: The summary is mostly neutral but partially adopts the source’s framing with terms like “backfired” and by presenting “self-deported” as a revealed fact rather than attributing it. It does, however, attribute the “gotcha”/misinformation framing to conservative media and avoids most of the article’s harsher rhetoric.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses “backfired” in the model’s own voice; otherwise mostly neutral and includes attribution for “gotcha”/misinformation.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: States Park “self-deported” as a revealed fact without explicit attribution, though it reflects the article’s claims.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: “Backfired” is a subjective characterization presented as fact; most other judgments are attributed.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Avoids the article’s inflammatory tone; only mild dramatization (“backfired”).
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Narrative centers on the conservative claim that the episode undermined Democrats; limited space for opposing perspective beyond setup.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Dem critique appears but little detail on their perspective beyond the ABC description; conservative framing more fully represented.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Minimal; “backfired” is the main subjective term.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Generally neutral; “misinformation” is attributed; “self-deported” mirrors the article’s term.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tone largely balanced and factual given the source.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No systematic deference to elites or grassroots; varied sources cited.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source but still inherits some framing (e.g., “backfired,” unqualified “self-deported”).
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Includes conservative media, ABC, the Democratic Rep., and social media voices; DHS/Noem’s perspective isn’t distinctly represented beyond mention.
